title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 233.055 - Treasurer of board
text:
233.055.  Treasurer of board. — Said board may appoint a treasurer and fix the amount of his bond and prescribe his duties, which said bond shall be filed in the office of the clerk of the county commission.
(RSMo 1939 § 8679) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 8030; 1919 § 10806; 1909 § 10582
